image_prompt_master: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface.
image_prompt_scene: scene: 洁净车间出口. must keep set elements: 回收箱, 鞋套收集桶, 口罩回收筐, 出口标识, 洁净通道出口. lighting: 明亮白光，指示照明.
image_prompt_shot: shot S003. camera intent: comic_panel_02. action beats: 人员沿地面路线行走离开; 将洁净服、鞋套、口罩放回指定回收箱. narration intent: 旁白 explains "参观结束后，请按指定路线离开洁净车间。洁净服、鞋套、口罩等按现场要求回收或放置，不得随意丢弃。离开后如有意见或问题，可统一反馈给陪同人员。". shot positive notes: 人员穿着洁净服从车间走出，沿地面箭头路线，将白色洁净服折叠放入回收箱，背景为更衣室出口，整洁有序.
image_prompt_final: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface. scene: 洁净车间出口. must keep set elements: 回收箱, 鞋套收集桶, 口罩回收筐, 出口标识, 洁净通道出口. lighting: 明亮白光，指示照明. shot S003. camera intent: comic_panel_02. action beats: 人员沿地面路线行走离开; 将洁净服、鞋套、口罩放回指定回收箱. narration intent: 旁白 explains "参观结束后，请按指定路线离开洁净车间。洁净服、鞋套、口罩等按现场要求回收或放置，不得随意丢弃。离开后如有意见或问题，可统一反馈给陪同人员。". shot positive notes: 人员穿着洁净服从车间走出，沿地面箭头路线，将白色洁净服折叠放入回收箱，背景为更衣室出口，整洁有序.
negative_prompt: cartoon, neon cyberpunk (unless explicitly requested), 随意丢弃洁净用品, 逆向进入, 杂乱丢弃，人员拥挤, face drift, outfit change, prop drift, wrong set layout, extra fingers, text artifacts, subtitles burned into image, logo, watermark

voiceover.speaker: 旁白
voiceover.text: 参观结束后，请按指定路线离开洁净车间。洁净服、鞋套、口罩等按现场要求回收或放置，不得随意丢弃。离开后如有意见或问题，可统一反馈给陪同人员。

manual_workflow.external_generation: paste image_prompt_final and negative_prompt into any web image/video tool; upload reference_images when supported
